modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for Ethernet port installation in dorm room

full_description_text:  
I am currently residing in a dorm room at USD Campus and I have noticed that there is no ethernet port available in my room. The outlet I found seems to be a phone port, specifically an RJ11, which is not what I need for my internet connection. I would like to formally request the installation of an ethernet port so that I can have a reliable internet connection for my studies and other online activities.
short_description: Request for Ethernet port installation in dorm room
description: I am currently residing in a dorm room at USD Campus and I have noticed that there is no ethernet port available in my room.
